overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in red pants running through the neon-lit streets of Night City, descending from elevated walkways, passing through plazas with vending machines, and entering the crowded Jig Jig Street red-light district with heavy Japanese-inspired neon signage and wet reflective streets.

moving from elevated walkway to ground level alley with trash bags

segments.scene_description: The character begins on an elevated metal grate walkway beneath glowing neon signs, descending a stairwell into a narrow enclosed alleyway. The environment features industrial concrete walls, piles of blue trash bags, and artificial lighting from nearby vending machines and signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with vending machines and overpass

events.description: exiting narrow alley into open plaza with rows of vending machines
character runs past pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the plaza

large painted tiger mural on building wall

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley, the scene opens into a wide plaza with wet concrete ground reflecting the neon lights. Rows of vending machines line the path ahead while a large overpass structure looms in the distance. The character passes a pedestrian crossing the plaza and approaches the building with a distinctive tiger mural.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass with neon storefronts

events.description: entering darker covered area under overpass with neon lighting from Bliss sign
approaching the Peepee show building with illuminated mannequin displays

agents.ego_description: running along covered walkway under concrete overpass toward neon storefronts

entered.detail: large cursive neon sign reading Bliss in warm yellow light

window display with illuminated mannequins in various poses
underside of concrete overpass with structural beams

segments.scene_description: Moving under the concrete overpass, the lighting shifts to dominant neon glow from the Bliss and Peepee signs. The walkway becomes semi-covered with the overpass ceiling visible overhead. The character passes by the distinctive Peepee show building with its illuminated mannequin displays in the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner walkway with Peepee building and Jig Jig Street approach

events.description: turning right at the Peepee building corner onto elevated walkway
approaching Jig Jig Street entrance with visible signage and crowds

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner and running along elevated walkway toward Jig Jig Street

notable_agents.action: woman in green crop top standing near Peepee entrance

entered.detail: large neon sign reading JIG JIG STREET in pink letters
green neon arrow sign pointing toward the street entrance
metal railing along the elevated walkway edge
scattered trash and debris on the walkway surface

segments.scene_description: Turning right at the corner of the Peepee building, the character runs along an elevated walkway with metal railings. The Jig Jig Street sign becomes visible in the distance with a green neon arrow pointing the way. A woman stands near the entrance smoking as the character approaches the crowded street entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: Jig Jig Street red light district with hanging lanterns and crowds

events.description: entering Jig Jig Street covered market area with dense crowds and smoke
ascending stairs into the main street level with spiral neon ceiling

agents.ego_description: running up stairs into the crowded neon-lit Jig Jig Street

person sitting on the stairs watching the crowd

entered.detail: traditional red paper lanterns hanging across the street
spiral-shaped neon light installation on the ceiling
storefronts with bright neon displays and signage
large digital billboard displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: Entering the narrow enclosed Jig Jig Street, the scene becomes densely crowded with pedestrians moving through the red-light district. Red paper lanterns hang overhead alongside a striking spiral neon ceiling installation. The character ascends stairs into the main thoroughfare lined with bright storefronts and digital billboards, surrounded by the bustling nightlife crowd.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded industrial alleyway into the densely crowded, neon-saturated heart of the Jig Jig Street red-light district. It begins on an elevated metal grate walkway, descending a stairwell into a narrow alley lined with concrete walls and blue trash bags. As the character emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a wide, wet plaza reflecting vibrant neon lights and leading toward a building with a tiger mural. The camera then moves under a concrete overpass where the lighting shifts to a dominant glow from the Bliss and Peepee signs, before turning right along a railed walkway toward a green neon arrow. Finally, the path leads into the narrow thoroughfare of Jig Jig Street, where the environment transforms into a bustling crowd beneath red paper lanterns and a spiral neon ceiling installation.
